channel.title: Carolina Hallén — Reflections
channel.description: Personal essays on chronic illness, resilience, identity and life after disruption.

item.title: Becoming Someone New
item.description: A personal reflection on grief, chronic illness, acceptance and the process of becoming someone new.
item.author: Carolina Hallén

item.title: Att bli någon ny
item.description: En personlig reflektion om sorg, kronisk sjukdom, acceptans och processen att bli någon ny.
item.author: Carolina Hallén
